narrative_beat: Escamas douradas e esmeralda com olhos rubis

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid ornate medieval serpent in gold and emerald green scales with raised head bifurcated tongue and ruby eyes coiled around a modern microphone representing voice synthesis deception in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the serpent's ruby eyes and bifurcated tongue coiled around the microphone
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated empty podcast studio with grey equipment in background
props: medieval serpent in gold and emerald

composition.rule: zoom-in on serpent and microphone composition

mood.emotion: voice cloning as the snake's tongue — AI voice synthesis

symbolism.primary: the serpent around the microphone — the original deceiver using the newest tool
symbolism.secondary: three seconds of audio sample — the tongue that needs barely a word

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
